title: Preserve cli delivery surface for v0.3 packaging lock
reason: Keep the ni project contract's delivery surface as the implemented CLI while preserving v0.3 packaging scope through accepted capability, requirement, evaluation, risk, and artifact records.
proposed_changes: Restore delivery_surfaces to the implemented cli surface expected by the contract tests.
Leave v0.3 README, distribution, visual identity, model workspace pack, and no-terminal planning scope represented by CAP-017 and linked records.
risk_impact: Reduces ambiguity between the implemented ni-kernel CLI surface and surrounding packaging or model-workspace adoption surfaces.
readiness_impact: Expected to remain READY because the v0.3 packaging capability keeps linked requirement, evaluation, risk mitigation, artifacts, non-goals, and no blocker questions.
